description: Formula: Enchant Cloak - Subtlety can be used by Enchanters to learn Subtlety at 300 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.
name: Formula: Enchant Cloak - Subtlety

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Cloak - Subtlety Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (300) Requires Thrallmar - Exalted Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a cloak to reduce how threatening the wearer is to monsters by 2%. Permanently enchant a cloak to decrease threat caused by the wearer by 2%. Sell Price: 2 50 Formula: Enchant Cloak - Subtlety can be used by Enchanters to learn Subtlety at 300 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.
